offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month, high churn rates cause lost revenue. We provide predictive insights and retention strategies instead of manual tracking of customer interactions and feedback.
problem: High customer churn rates leading to lost revenue.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Engage on Indie Hackers about retention strategies
DM outreach to Shopify store owners with demo video
Participate in community forums for Shopify tools
try_it: Let users try Churn data tracking and Customer feedback analysis on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
